title: SelfProofBundle
description: One verifiable Self (self.xyz) proof, as produced by the Self app and verified by @selfxyz/core's SelfBackendVerifier on the self-bridge. The skill collects one bundle per age threshold into an EnrollmentBundle (enrollment.json) and POSTs it to the broker's POST /v1/register. The broker re-verifies each bundle once (off-chain SNARK + a one-time on-chain Celo registry/root check), then issues a broker-signed DelegationToken (delegation.json). Bundles are NOT stored after registration and never travel per answer. See ARCHITECTURE.md §5/§8.

attestationId.description: Self attestation type (e.g. passport). Must be in the bridge's SELF_ALLOWED_IDS.

proof.description: The zk-SNARK proof object emitted by the Self app (opaque to the broker; verified by @selfxyz/core).

publicSignals.description: Public signals array from the prover; verified together with proof.

userContextData.description: Hex string committing to (destChainId, userIdentifier, userDefinedData). userDefinedData carries the agent's Ed25519 public key (the agent-key bind); the broker checks the verified userDefinedData equals the EnrollmentBundle's agent_key.
